description_long: This is a large, rectangular blackboard with a dark green writing surface, flanked by two slightly angled side panels. The central panel features faint white chalk markings, including a benzene ring and chemical formulas, suggesting it is used for educational or office purposes. The frame appears to be thin and metallic, providing structural support without being visually obtrusive. The surface is matte, reducing glare and making chalk writing easily visible. There is no visible chalk holder or tray attached to the frame. The overall condition of the blackboard is pristine, with no visible scratches, chips, or signs of heavy use.
description: A large, three-panel dark green blackboard with a thin metal frame and faint chalk markings, in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main writing surface with chalk markings and two angled side panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and slight angling of the side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, dark green back of the blackboard with no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and angled side panels.
attribute_frame_design: thin metallic frame, dark gray, minimalistic with no decorative features
